features.featureTitle: Add a 'Reset' button to the MaintenanceManagement component UI. The button should be visible only to admin users (consistent with the existing admin-only 'Add Maintenance Expense' button pattern). The button should be styled with a destructive/warning style (e.g., red or orange) to indicate it is a dangerous action. The button should render in the header/controls area of the maintenance management section. The button must have no click handler logic attached yet — it should be inert (or log a placeholder console message). Do not add any backend calls or state changes.
